## MCP Reference

### Tools

| Name | Title | Parameters | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `cancel_batch` | Cancel Batch | `Parameters<params::BatchIdParams>` | Cancel an in-progress batch processing job |
| `cancel_response` | Cancel Response | `Parameters<params::ResponseIdParams>` | Cancel an in-progress response (Responses API) |
| `chat` | Chat Completion | `Parameters<params::ChatParams>` | Send a chat completion request to an LLM |
| `create_batch` | Create Batch | `Parameters<params::CreateBatchParams>` | Create a new batch processing job |
| `create_file` | Upload File | `Parameters<params::CreateFileParams>` | Upload a file to the LLM provider |
| `create_response` | Create Response | `Parameters<params::CreateResponseParams>` | Create a new response (Responses API) |
| `delete_file` | Delete File | `Parameters<params::FileIdParams>` | Delete an uploaded file |
| `embed` | Generate Embeddings | `Parameters<params::EmbedParams>` | Generate text embeddings for the given input |
| `file_content` | Get File Content | `Parameters<params::FileIdParams>` | Retrieve the raw content of an uploaded file |
| `generate_image` | Generate Images | `Parameters<params::ImageParams>` | Generate images from a text prompt |
| `list_batches` | List Batches | `Parameters<params::ListBatchesParams>` | List batch processing jobs |
| `list_files` | List Files | `Parameters<params::ListFilesParams>` | List uploaded files |
| `list_models` | List Models | `Parameters<params::EmptyParams>` | List available models from configured providers |
| `moderate` | Moderate Content | `Parameters<params::ModerateParams>` | Check content against moderation policies |
| `ocr` | OCR Extract | `Parameters<params::OcrParams>` | Extract text from an image or document via OCR |
| `rerank` | Rerank Documents | `Parameters<params::RerankParams>` | Rerank documents by relevance to a query |
| `retrieve_batch` | Retrieve Batch | `Parameters<params::BatchIdParams>` | Retrieve a batch processing job by ID |
| `retrieve_file` | Retrieve File | `Parameters<params::FileIdParams>` | Retrieve metadata for an uploaded file |
| `retrieve_response` | Retrieve Response | `Parameters<params::ResponseIdParams>` | Retrieve a response by ID (Responses API) |
| `search` | Search | `Parameters<params::SearchParams>` | Perform a web or document search |
| `speech` | Text to Speech | `Parameters<params::SpeechParams>` | Generate speech audio from text (text-to-speech) |
| `transcribe` | Transcribe Audio | `Parameters<params::TranscribeParams>` | Transcribe audio to text (speech-to-text) |

### Prompts

| Name | Title | Parameters | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `extract` | Extract | `Parameters<params::ExtractArgs>` | Extract structured data from text following instructions |
| `summarize` | Summarize | `Parameters<params::SummarizeArgs>` | Summarise a block of text concisely |
| `translate` | Translate | `Parameters<params::TranslateArgs>` | Translate text into a target language |
